name: 💫 Comet <INCREDIBOX ANYTHING>
description:
The character has a bright and cheerful appearance centered around a large yellow star-shaped head. Their face is simple and expressive, featuring large black eyes with sparkling star-shaped highlights that give them a constantly excited and curious look. Small freckles dot their cheeks, and their gentle smile makes them appear friendly and approachable.

They wear an oversized reddish-orange hoodie with a star emblem on the chest, adding to their cozy and casual style. The loose sleeves and relaxed fit make them look comfortable and youthful. Colorful ribbon-like pieces hang from the sides of their head, adding a playful splash of color and making the design feel more energetic
creator: Animatic_core
